business.name: Quality Handyman Services
business.tagline: The guy Tampa calls when it needs doing right

hero.headline: When it's gotta be *done right* the first time
hero.subheadline: Same-day service, no-rush precision work. Ask around Tampa — John shows up ready and gets it done.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: TV mounting, assembly, repairs — handled
services_section.subheading: John takes his time to do it right. No rushing, no shortcuts.

services.title: TV Mounting & Setup
services.description: Every TV mounted level, secure, and perfect. Multiple TVs? Same attention to each one. Clean cable management included.

services.title: Furniture Assembly
services.description: Dressers, storage cubes, whatever needs putting together. Real care and attention to detail, not just thrown together.

services.title: Wall Repairs & Patching
services.description: Holes patched, walls prepped, surfaces restored. Often included at no extra charge because that's how we work.

services.title: Home Repairs & Installations
services.description: Salon stations, storage solutions, general repairs. If it's broken or needs installing, John handles it right.

about.heading: John's the guy Tampa trusts
about.body: Quality Handyman Services has earned 5 stars from over 106 Tampa customers because John doesn't rush. He shows up ready to work, focuses on getting every detail right, and treats your home like his own. Same-day service when you need it, but never at the cost of quality work.

reviews.name: Sherry H.
reviews.text: John mounted my TVs and assembled a dresser with real attention to detail. Everything was perfect, level, and secure. Absolutely phenomenal work.

reviews.name: Gary M.
reviews.text: Very specific in his work — diligent and focused. Dismounted 3 large TVs from my old house, relocated them to my new place, and patched holes at no extra charge.

reviews.name: Osandai V.
reviews.text: John came same day late hours and hung all 3 of our TVs. Fast, very clean, great prices. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Kaye L.
reviews.text: Mounted TV, storage cube, and salon station at my daughter's salon suite. Showed up ready to work as scheduled, completed professionally and on time.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Tampa and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Same-day service throughout the greater Tampa Bay region

cta.heading: Ready to get it done right?
cta.body: Call John directly for same-day service or a quick quote. No hassle, no runaround — just straight talk about getting your job handled.
